name: wakewait
description: Quiet low-token wait/sleep routing for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Quiet low-token wait/sleep routing for Codex.
interface.longDescription: WakeWait is a skill-only Codex plugin. The installer writes one canonical skill copy by default. Plain fixed-duration delays stay native, while bundled PowerShell and POSIX scripts handle wait-file, wait-contains, and wait-command without model polling or persistent state.
defaultPrompt: Use native shell commands for a 10-minute fixed delay.
Wait for an output file with the bundled WakeWait shell script.
Install the WakeWait v2 skill and scripts.
